revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 21 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 21 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月21日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[養老]]4年（[[720年]]_月_日） - 舎人親王らが『[[日本書紀]]』30巻と系図1巻を撰上 * [[弘安]]4年（[[1281年]]_月_日） - [[壱岐]]・[[対馬]]に[[高麗]]の兵船が襲来。[[弘安の役]]の始まり * [[天正]]3年（[[1575年]][[7月9日]]） - [[長篠の戦い]] * [[文政]]10年（[[1827年]]_月_日） - [[頼山陽]]が元老中・[[松平定信]]に『[[日本外史]]』22巻を献呈 * [[明治]]2年（[[1869年]]_月_日） - 京都市で日本初の[[小学校]]が開校
== 誕生日 == * （[[1107年]]_月_日） - [[趙惇]]（光宗）、[[南宋]]の3代皇帝（+ [[1187年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月20日 (旧暦)|5月20日]] 翌日[[5月22日 (旧暦)|5月22日]] - 前月[[4月21日 (旧暦)|4月21日]] 翌月[[6月21日 (旧暦)|6月21日]] *新暦[[5月21日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦5月21日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[養老]]4年（[[720年]]_月_日） - 舎人親王らが『[[日本書紀]]』30巻と系図1巻を撰上 * [[弘安]]4年（[[1281年]]_月_日） - [[壱岐]]・[[対馬]]に[[高麗]]の兵船が襲来。[[弘安の役]]の始まり * [[天正]]3年（[[1575年]][[7月9日]]） - [[長篠の戦い]] * [[文政]]10年（[[1827年]]_月_日） - [[頼山陽]]が元老中・[[松平定信]]に『[[日本外史]]』22巻を献呈 * [[明治]]2年（[[1869年]]_月_日） - 京都市で日本初の[[小学校]]が開校
== 誕生日 == * （[[1107年]]_月_日） - [[趙惇]]（光宗）、[[南宋]]の3代皇帝（+ [[1187年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月20日 (旧暦)|5月20日]] 翌日[[5月22日 (旧暦)|5月22日]] - 前月[[4月21日 (旧暦)|4月21日]] 翌月[[6月21日 (旧暦)|6月21日]] *新暦[[5月21日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月21日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[養老]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[720年]][[7月1日]]） - 舎人親王らが『[[日本書紀]]』30巻と系図1巻を撰上 * [[弘安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1281年]][[6月9日]]） - [[壱岐]]・[[対馬]]に[[高麗]]の兵船が襲来。[[弘安の役]]の始まり * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月29日]]） - [[長篠の戦い]] * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1827年]][[6月15日]]） - [[頼山陽]]が元老中・[[松平定信]]に『[[日本外史]]』22巻を献呈 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月30日]]） - 京都市で日本初の[[小学校]]が開校
== 誕生日 == * （ユリウス暦[[1107年]][[6月13日]]） - [[趙惇]]（光宗）、[[南宋]]の3代皇帝（+ [[1187年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|20|5|22|4|21|6|5|0521}}

== できごと == * [[養老]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[720年]][[7月1日]]） - 舎人親王らが『[[日本書紀]]』30巻と系図1巻を撰上 * [[弘安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1281年]][[6月9日]]） - [[壱岐]]・[[対馬]]に[[高麗]]の兵船が襲来。[[弘安の役]]の始まり * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月29日]]） - [[長篠の戦い]] * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1827年]][[6月15日]]） - [[頼山陽]]が元老中・[[松平定信]]に『[[日本外史]]』22巻を献呈 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月30日]]） - 京都市で日本初の[[小学校]]が開校
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|20|5|22|4|21|6|5|0521}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:旧暦May]][[sn:May 21 (lunar calendar)]][[Category:qq]]

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 21'''<!--Lunar May21 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[養老]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[720年]][[7月1日]]） - 舎人親王らが『[[日本書紀]]』30巻と系図1巻を撰上 * [[弘安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1281年]][[6月9日]]） - [[壱岐]]・[[対馬]]に[[高麗]]の兵船が襲来。[[弘安の役]]の始まり * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月29日]]） - [[長篠の戦い]] * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1827年]][[6月15日]]） - [[頼山陽]]が元老中・[[松平定信]]に『[[日本外史]]』22巻を献呈 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月30日]]） - 京都市で日本初の[[小学校]]が開校
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] [[zh:五月廿一]] [[en:draft:May 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}}, [[720]]) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}, consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}}, [[1281]]) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}}, {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}}, marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}}. * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}, [[1575]]) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}}, [[1827]]) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}}, a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}}. * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}}, [[1869]]) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}.
== Births ==
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== Deaths ==

[[sn:May 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] [[zh:五月廿一]] [[en:draft:May 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}}, [[720]]) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}, consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}}, [[1281]]) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}}, {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}}, marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}}. * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}, [[1575]]) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}}, [[1827]]) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}}, a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}}. * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}}, [[1869]]) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}.

== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[May 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[May 21 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] [[zh:五月廿一]] [[en:draft:May 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .
== Births ==
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== Deaths ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|20|5|22|4|21|6|5|0521}}

== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .

[[sn:May 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] [[zh:五月廿一]] [[en:draft:May 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .
== Births ==
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== Deaths ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|20|5|22|4|21|6|5|0521}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .

[[sn:May 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] [[zh:五月廿一]] [[en:draft:May 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .
== Births ==
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== Deaths ==

[[sn:May 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] [[zh:五月廿一]] [[en:draft:May 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .

== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .

[[sn:May 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] [[zh:五月廿一]] [[en:draft:May 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}} .
== Births ==
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日|12=draft}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王|12=draft}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀|12=draft}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇|12=draft}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗|12=draft}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬|12=draft}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役|12=draft}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い|12=draft}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽|12=draft}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史|12=draft}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信|12=draft}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校|12=draft}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths == == See Also ==

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王|12=draft|12=draft}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀|12=draft|12=draft}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗|12=draft|12=draft}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬|12=draft|12=draft}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽|12=draft|12=draft}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史|12=draft|12=draft}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校|12=draft|12=draft}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|ja|7月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[720]] ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|ja|舎人親王|12=draft|12=draft}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀|12=draft|12=draft}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Japan)|ja|弘安|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|ja|6月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1281]] ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|ja|元寇|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Goryeo|ja|高麗|12=draft|12=draft}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|ja|対馬|12=draft|12=draft}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Kōan campaign|ja|弘安の役|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1575]] ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|ja|長篠の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|ja|6月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1827]] ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|ja|頼山陽|12=draft|12=draft}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|ja|日本外史|12=draft|12=draft}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|ja|松平定信|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|ja|6月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1869]] ) – Japan's first {{ill|Elementary school|ja|小学校|12=draft|12=draft}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市|12=draft|12=draft}} .

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月21日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[養老]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[720年]][[7月1日]]） - 舎人親王らが『[[日本書紀]]』30巻と系図1巻を撰上 * [[弘安]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1281年]][[6月9日]]） - [[壱岐]]・[[対馬]]に[[高麗]]の兵船が襲来。[[弘安の役]]の始まり * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月29日]]） - [[長篠の戦い]] * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1827年]][[6月15日]]） - [[頼山陽]]が元老中・[[松平定信]]に『[[日本外史]]』22巻を献呈 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月30日]]） - 京都市で日本初の[[小学校]]が開校
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|20|5|22|4|21|6|5|0521}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839620]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 21|qq=May 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:July 1|July 1]] , [[:en:720|720]] ) – [[:en:Prince Toneri|Prince Toneri]] and others present the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan (Japan)]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 9|June 9]] , [[:en:1281|1281]] ) – [[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions of Japan]] , [[:en:Goryeo|Goryeo]] warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and [[:en:Tsushima Island|Tsushima Island]] , marking the beginning of the [[:en:Battle of Kōan|Kōan campaign]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 29|June 29]] , [[:en:1575|1575]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Nagashino|Battle of Nagashino]] takes place. * Year 10 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 15|June 15]] , [[:en:1827|1827]] ) – [[:en:Rai San'yō|Rai San'yō]] presents his [[:en:Nihon Gaishi|Nihon Gaishi]] , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] . * Year 2 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 30|June 30]] , [[:en:1869|1869]] ) – Japan's first [[:en:Primary school|Elementary school]] opens in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]] .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]][[zh min nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿一]][[zh:五月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839620]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 21|qq=May 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:July 1|July 1]] , [[:en:720|720]] ) – [[:en:Prince Toneri|Prince Toneri]] and others present the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan (Japan)]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 9|June 9]] , [[:en:1281|1281]] ) – [[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions of Japan]] , [[:en:Goryeo|Goryeo]] warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and [[:en:Tsushima Island|Tsushima Island]] , marking the beginning of the [[:en:Battle of Kōan|Kōan campaign]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 29|June 29]] , [[:en:1575|1575]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Nagashino|Battle of Nagashino]] takes place. * Year 10 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 15|June 15]] , [[:en:1827|1827]] ) – [[:en:Rai San'yō|Rai San'yō]] presents his [[:en:Nihon Gaishi|Nihon Gaishi]] , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] . * Year 2 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 30|June 30]] , [[:en:1869|1869]] ) – Japan's first [[:en:Primary school|Elementary school]] opens in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]] .

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:July 1|July 1]] , [[:en:720|720]] ) – [[:en:Prince Toneri|Prince Toneri]] and others present the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan (Japan)]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 9|June 9]] , [[:en:1281|1281]] ) – [[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions of Japan]] , [[:en:Goryeo|Goryeo]] warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and [[:en:Tsushima Island|Tsushima Island]] , marking the beginning of the [[:en:Battle of Kōan|Kōan campaign]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 29|June 29]] , [[:en:1575|1575]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Nagashino|Battle of Nagashino]] takes place. * Year 10 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 15|June 15]] , [[:en:1827|1827]] ) – [[:en:Rai San'yō|Rai San'yō]] presents his [[:en:Nihon Gaishi|Nihon Gaishi]] , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] . * Year 2 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 30|June 30]] , [[:en:1869|1869]] ) – Japan's first [[:en:Primary school|Elementary school]] opens in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]] .

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:July 1|July 1]] , [[:en:720|720]] ) – [[:en:Prince Toneri|Prince Toneri]] and others present the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan (Japan)]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 9|June 9]] , [[:en:1281|1281]] ) – [[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions of Japan]] , [[:en:Goryeo|Goryeo]] warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and [[:en:Tsushima Island|Tsushima Island]] , marking the beginning of the [[:en:Battle of Kōan|Kōan campaign]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 29|June 29]] , [[:en:1575|1575]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Nagashino|Battle of Nagashino]] takes place. * Year 10 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 15|June 15]] , [[:en:1827|1827]] ) – [[:en:Rai San'yō|Rai San'yō]] presents his [[:en:Nihon Gaishi|Nihon Gaishi]] , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] . * Year 2 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 30|June 30]] , [[:en:1869|1869]] ) – Japan's first [[:en:Primary school|Elementary school]] opens in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]] .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿一]][[zh:五月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839620]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 21|qq=May 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:July 1|July 1]] , [[:en:720|720]] ) – [[:en:Prince Toneri|Prince Toneri]] and others present the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan (Japan)]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 9|June 9]] , [[:en:1281|1281]] ) – [[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions of Japan]] , [[:en:Goryeo|Goryeo]] warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and [[:en:Tsushima Island|Tsushima Island]] , marking the beginning of the [[:en:Battle of Kōan|Kōan campaign]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 29|June 29]] , [[:en:1575|1575]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Nagashino|Battle of Nagashino]] takes place. * Year 10 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 15|June 15]] , [[:en:1827|1827]] ) – [[:en:Rai San'yō|Rai San'yō]] presents his [[:en:Nihon Gaishi|Nihon Gaishi]] , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] . * Year 2 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 30|June 30]] , [[:en:1869|1869]] ) – Japan's first [[:en:Primary school|Elementary school]] opens in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]] .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿一]][[zh:五月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿一]][[zh:五月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿一]][[zh:五月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839620]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 21|qq=May 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:July 1|July 1]] , [[:en:720|720]] ) – [[:en:Prince Toneri|Prince Toneri]] and others present the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan (Japan)]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 9|June 9]] , [[:en:1281|1281]] ) – [[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions of Japan]] , [[:en:Goryeo|Goryeo]] warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and [[:en:Tsushima Island|Tsushima Island]] , marking the beginning of the [[:en:Battle of Kōan|Kōan campaign]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 29|June 29]] , [[:en:1575|1575]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Nagashino|Battle of Nagashino]] takes place. * Year 10 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 15|June 15]] , [[:en:1827|1827]] ) – [[:en:Rai San'yō|Rai San'yō]] presents his [[:en:Nihon Gaishi|Nihon Gaishi]] , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] . * Year 2 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 30|June 30]] , [[:en:1869|1869]] ) – Japan's first [[:en:Primary school|Elementary school]] opens in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]] .

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of [[:en:Yōrō|Yōrō]] (Julian calendar [[:en:July 1|July 1]] , [[:en:720|720]] ) – [[:en:Prince Toneri|Prince Toneri]] and others present the [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of [[:en:Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan (Japan)]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 9|June 9]] , [[:en:1281|1281]] ) – [[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions of Japan]] , [[:en:Goryeo|Goryeo]] warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and [[:en:Tsushima Island|Tsushima Island]] , marking the beginning of the [[:en:Battle of Kōan|Kōan campaign]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] (Julian calendar [[:en:June 29|June 29]] , [[:en:1575|1575]] ) – The [[:en:Battle of Nagashino|Battle of Nagashino]] takes place. * Year 10 of [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 15|June 15]] , [[:en:1827|1827]] ) – [[:en:Rai San'yō|Rai San'yō]] presents his [[:en:Nihon Gaishi|Nihon Gaishi]] , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor [[:en:Matsudaira Sadanobu|Matsudaira Sadanobu]] . * Year 2 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:June 30|June 30]] , [[:en:1869|1869]] ) – Japan's first [[:en:Primary school|Elementary school]] opens in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]] .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿一]][[zh:五月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿一]][[zh:五月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿一]][[zh:五月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839620]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 21|qq=May 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|en|July 1|WD=Q2700|lt=July 1}} , {{ill|720|en|720|WD=Q23539|lt=720}} ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|en|Prince Toneri|WD=Q1362200|lt=Prince Toneri}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|WD=Q389180|lt=Kōan (Japan)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9}} , {{ill|1281|en|1281|WD=Q5537|lt=1281}} ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|en|Mongol invasions of Japan|WD=Q208156|lt=Mongol invasions of Japan}} , {{ill|Goryeo|en|Goryeo|WD=Q28208|lt=Goryeo}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|en|Tsushima Island|WD=Q52051|lt=Tsushima Island}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Battle of Kōan|en|Battle of Kōan|WD=Q2237622|lt=Kōan campaign}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}} , {{ill|1575|en|1575|WD=Q6688|lt=1575}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|en|Battle of Nagashino|WD=Q428369|lt=Battle of Nagashino}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15}} , {{ill|1827|en|1827|WD=Q7008|lt=1827}} ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|en|Rai San'yō|WD=Q153320|lt=Rai San'yō}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|en|Nihon Gaishi|WD=Q835469|lt=Nihon Gaishi}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|WD=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadanobu}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30}} , {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} ) – Japan's first {{ill|Primary school|en|Primary school|WD=Q9842|lt=Elementary school}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto}} .

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|WD=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 1|en|July 1|WD=Q2700|lt=July 1|1=July 1}} , {{ill|720|en|720|WD=Q23539|lt=720|1=720}} ) – {{ill|Prince Toneri|en|Prince Toneri|WD=Q1362200|lt=Prince Toneri|1=Prince Toneri}} and others present the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}} , consisting of 30 volumes and one volume of genealogies. * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|WD=Q389180|lt=Kōan (Japan)|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 9|en|June 9|WD=Q2618|lt=June 9|1=June 9}} , {{ill|1281|en|1281|WD=Q5537|lt=1281|1=1281}} ) – {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|en|Mongol invasions of Japan|WD=Q208156|lt=Mongol invasions of Japan|1=Mongol invasions of Japan}} , {{ill|Goryeo|en|Goryeo|WD=Q28208|lt=Goryeo|1=Goryeo}} warships attack {{ill|Iki Island|ja|壱岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki Island|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島}} and {{ill|Tsushima Island|en|Tsushima Island|WD=Q52051|lt=Tsushima Island|1=Tsushima Island}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Battle of Kōan|en|Battle of Kōan|WD=Q2237622|lt=Kōan campaign|1=Battle of Kōan}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29|1=June 29}} , {{ill|1575|en|1575|WD=Q6688|lt=1575|1=1575}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Nagashino|en|Battle of Nagashino|WD=Q428369|lt=Battle of Nagashino|1=Battle of Nagashino}} takes place. * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 15|en|June 15|WD=Q2613|lt=June 15|1=June 15}} , {{ill|1827|en|1827|WD=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} ) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|en|Rai San'yō|WD=Q153320|lt=Rai San'yō|1=Rai San'yō}} presents his {{ill|Nihon Gaishi|en|Nihon Gaishi|WD=Q835469|lt=Nihon Gaishi|1=Nihon Gaishi}} , a 22-volume history of Japan, to senior councillor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|WD=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadanobu|1=Matsudaira Sadanobu}} . * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30|1=June 30}} , {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} ) – Japan's first {{ill|Primary school|en|Primary school|WD=Q9842|lt=Elementary school|1=Primary school}} opens in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}} .
